sources.title: Phase 1 declared seed tables
sources.licence: repository-declared; source notes required per row before publication
sources.attribution: Ventus Ltd declared seed data with source notes
sources.notes: Used only to establish schema and first canonical entity list. Replace indicative rows with verified source-backed records before publication.

sources.title: GB DNO licence area boundaries
sources.licence: NESO Open Licence; verify per resource at fetch time
sources.attribution: Supported by National Energy SO Open Data
sources.notes: Source geometry may require reprojection to EPSG:4326 for RFC 7946 GeoJSON. Treat as approximate screening geometry.

sources.title: NESO data portal catalogue
sources.attribution: Supported by National Energy SO Open Data where applicable
sources.notes: Catalogue discovery only. Dataset redistribution depends on per-resource licence.

sources.title: Electricity licence register
sources.licence: OGL v3 expected; verify before fetch
sources.attribution: Contains public sector information licensed under the Open Government Licence v3.0
sources.notes: Authoritative source for licensed DNO, IDNO, supplier and related electricity licence holders.

sources.title: Stable UK government public energy-data source class
sources.licence: OGL v3 expected for most datasets; verify per dataset
sources.attribution: Contains public sector information licensed under the Open Government Licence v3.0
sources.notes: Use stable folder name. Store publishing department as data lineage, not as folder identity.

sources.title: UK Power Networks open data portal
sources.attribution: UK Power Networks open data; verify per dataset
sources.notes: Use records endpoint for bounded preview/schema only; use exports endpoint for bulk extraction.

sources.title: SP Energy Networks open data portal
sources.attribution: SP Energy Networks open data; verify per dataset
sources.notes: Use records endpoint for bounded preview/schema only; use exports endpoint for bulk extraction.

sources.title: Electricity North West open data portal
sources.attribution: Electricity North West open data; verify per dataset
sources.notes: Candidate URL must be verified by catalogue fetcher; do not publish data unless licence is confirmed.

sources.title: Northern Powergrid open data portal
sources.attribution: Northern Powergrid open data; verify per dataset
sources.notes: Candidate URL must be verified by catalogue fetcher; do not publish data unless licence is confirmed.

sources.title: National Grid Electricity Distribution connected data portal
sources.attribution: National Grid Electricity Distribution connected data; verify per dataset
sources.notes: Token-gated CKAN source. Never commit API tokens. Rate-limit and write degraded audit state on auth failure.

sources.title: SSEN Distribution data portal
sources.attribution: SSEN Distribution data; verify per dataset
sources.notes: Do not treat as OpenDataSoft. Build a separate fetcher after portal metadata mechanics are verified.

sources.title: NIE Networks public data
sources.notes: Northern Ireland default restricted until terms are cleared.

sources.title: ESB Networks public data
sources.notes: Republic of Ireland default restricted until terms are cleared.

sources.title: EirGrid public data
sources.notes: Default restricted until terms are cleared.

sources.title: SONI public data
sources.notes: Default restricted until terms are cleared.
